full_text:
Feng Xu 封胥
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Xu (封胥). One of the Ten Regular Attendants. An agent of Zhang Jue of the Yellow Scarves. Feng Xu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yellow Scarves. Feng Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
